note_combined: SF+HP extracted as single track-level vector (first 30s). Tiling to per-segment dimensions adds constant noise to Top-K comparison, diluting MERT segment discrimination. For Top-K, MERT alone is correct. SF+HP work at track level (banded diagonal) not segment level (Top-K).
interpretation: AI generators do not preserve temporal structure of the source. Banded diagonal assumes borrowed content appears at the same relative timestamp — wrong for AI attribution. Top-K finds the most similar segment pair regardless of time — correct for AI attribution.
